signals.headline: Lakers take 2-0 series lead over Rockets in Game 2 with dominant performances from LeBron James (28 PTS) and Marcus Smar
signals.raw:
Lakers take 2-0 series lead over Rockets in Game 2 with dominant performances from LeBron James (28 PTS) and Marcus Smart (25 PTS, 5 STL)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]

Game 2 concluded April 21, 2026, with Lakers winning 101-94, powered by LeBron passing Kareem for most playoff points by a 41+ player and Smart's historic two-way stat line; series shifts to Houston for Game 3 on Friday[1][3][5].
